description_for_human: Curated directory of frontier AI models with Elo rankings, cost data, context windows, and task-specific recommendations. Updated weekly.
description_for_model: Query the Hello AI directory to look up frontier AI models (Claude, Gemini, Grok, GPT) with their Elo ratings, pricing per million tokens, and context window sizes. Use /api/recommend with a task parameter to get ranked model suggestions for a specific use case. Use /api/models to list all models. Use /api/status to check data freshness. No authentication required.
